name: Blastforge Breach
short_description: In this game, you must defend yourself by firing cannon shots at evil pigs and bats.
detailed_description:
In this game, you must defend yourself by firing cannon shots at evil pigs and bats. Every projectile follows realistic physics, so you have to carefully calculate the angle and strength of your shots to hit the targets. Sometimes, the laws of physics will change, and you will need to quickly adapt to the new conditions to succeed.

On your way to victory, you will face different types of obstacles such as moving platforms, fragile blocks that break easily, and teleporters that change the projectile’s path. By thinking ahead and adjusting your shots, you can overcome all challenges and reach your goal!

Game Features:

  • Colorful and beautiful graphics

  • Fun and engaging physics-based gameplay

  • 40 handcrafted levels with increasing difficulty
